query:
ALTER TABLE customers 
ADD COLUMN membershipStatus ENUM('pending', 'active', 'expired') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL COMMENT '会员状态',
ADD COLUMN membershipOrderId INT COMMENT '会员订单ID',
ADD COLUMN membershipActivatedAt TIMESTAMP NULL COMMENT '会员激活时间',
ADD COLUMN membershipExpiresAt TIMESTAMP NULL COMMENT '会员到期时间';

ALTER TABLE customers 
ADD COLUMN membershipStatus ENUM('pending', 'active', 'expired') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL COMMENT '会员状态',
ADD COLUMN membershipOrderId INT COMMENT '会员订单ID',
ADD COLUMN membershipActivatedAt TIMESTAMP NULL COMMENT '会员激活时间',
ADD COLUMN membershipExpiresAt TIMESTAMP NULL COMMENT '会员到期时间';
